title: TM-Spec v0.3
description: Third Matter Specification -- meta-language for atomistic systems (structure / defects / magnetic / environment / reactions / DFT or MLIP calculation / workflow / sanity gates / provenance). v0.3 adds an endpoint.geometry_origin field and an optional top-level `preflight` block (predictive pre-flight assessment, the forward-looking counterpart of the post-hoc `sanity` array); both share the gate-ID vocabulary in docs/gate-registry.md. Existing kinds remain valid (additive bump). Aligned with NOMAD Metainfo, OPTIMADE 1.3, QCSchema, magCIF, AFLOW prototype, AiiDA provenance, Antimony 3, PHREEQC v3, pymatgen-defects, doped, MACE, CHGNet. See docs/standards-alignment.md and docs/design-decisions.md.

kind.description: Per D-18/D-21/D-22/D-23/D-24: each enhanced-sampling family is a separate kind. MDCalculation = plain MD. MLIPBenchmark = cross-method comparison. SinglePointCalculation = single SCF / electronic-structure analysis (NOMAD ecosystem dominant). RelaxCalculation = geometry optimisation.

magnetic_state.description: Per D-07: human-friendly shortcuts. Exact symmetry via optional bns_group.

basis_kind.description: Per D-02: plane_waves primary (NOMAD), PW/pw aliases.

status.description: Per D-13: TM-Spec richer than emmet successful/unsuccessful/error.

pass_value.description: Per D-15: true|false plus warn (anomaly, non-blocking) and skip (gate not applicable).

unit_bearing.description: Field that may be 'value units' string (e.g. '3.687 Å') or plain number.

prototype.description: AFLOW prototype label per D-04. E.g. AB_tP4_129_a_c

lattice_vectors_A.description: Cartesian lattice vectors in Å (OPTIMADE export, D-04).

geometry_origin.description: How this single structure's geometry was obtained (method x relaxation), mirroring endpoint.geometry_origin. Surfaced via gate G09_geometry_origin (docs/gate-registry.md). For NEB use endpoint-level geometry_origin (one per endpoint, energies comparable only across dft_relaxed); for single-structure docs (SinglePoint/Relax imports) prefer this structure-level field. Energy comparisons are valid only for dft_relaxed; an mlip_relaxed geometry can carry tens of eV of unrelaxed-lattice error even when local bond lengths look physical.

objects.description: Machine layer per D-06 (pymatgen-defects + doped naming).

bns_group.description: Optional magCIF BNS magnetic space group (D-07).

temp_C.description: Computed from T for PHREEQC export (D-08).

backends.description: Per D-17: for method=MLIP, list of compared backends.

geometry_origin.description: How this endpoint geometry was obtained (method x relaxation; a human shortcut in the spirit of magnetic.state). Maps to emmet run_type x task_type (dft_relaxed ~ '<XC> Structure Optimization', dft_static ~ '<XC> Static') and NOMAD electronic_structure_method (mlip_relaxed ~ method=ML; QCSchema expresses 'final optimized geometry' structurally via OptimizationResult.final_molecule). Distinct from the top-level 'provenance' (record authorship). Energy comparisons across endpoints are valid only for dft_relaxed; an mlip_relaxed geometry can carry tens of eV of unrelaxed-lattice error even when local bond lengths look physical (gate G09_geometry_origin in docs/gate-registry.md).

variables.description: Either explicit list or symbolic description string (e.g. 'd(H_37, Fe_i) for i in 1..18').

python_impl.description: null when CV is implemented natively in the engine (e.g. CP2K COLVAR).

fes_analysis.description: Free Energy Surface reconstruction (analog pmf_analysis for metadyn).

results_metad.description: Results for MetaDynCalculation. paper_quotable + quote_constraint per D-14 extension.

md_protocol.description: Per D-21: plain MD (no enhanced sampling) — AIMD, classical MD, foundation-MLIP MD.

trajectory_analysis.description: Post-hoc trajectory observables for plain MD (NOT enhanced sampling).

benchmark_setup.description: Per D-22: cross-method benchmark (e.g. MACE/CHGNet vs DFT).

metrics.description: Cross-method comparison metrics. Each entry maps backend → value.

relax_protocol.description: Per D-24: geometry-optimisation protocol. Single trajectory (no NEB endpoints, no biased sampling).

optimizer.description: BFGS, LBFGS, FIRE, CG, MDMin, GoodOldQuasiNewton, ASE Optimizer subclass name, or code-native (vc-relax, ions-only, …).

cell_relax.description: true → vc-relax / variable cell; false → ions-only.

fixed_atoms.description: Atom indices held fixed (FixAtoms). Empty/omitted = all free.

trajectory.description: Path to ASE-style .traj or extxyz trajectory artefact.

results_relax.description: Per D-24: results for RelaxCalculation. Single endpoint (final structure + energy + max force).

final_structure_ref.description: Path to relaxed extxyz/CIF, e.g. relaxed.extxyz.

stress_GPa.description: Final stress tensor in GPa (Voigt order: xx, yy, zz, yz, xz, xy).

electronic_structure_analysis.description: Per D-23: optional post-SCF observables (DOS, band structure, gap, charges). All sub-objects are open-ended to accommodate code-specific outputs (VASP DOSCAR, QE bands.dat, GPAW wfcs).

kpath.description: Symmetry path label, e.g. 'Γ-X-W-K-Γ-L-U-W-L-K|U-X' or AFLOW band path.

charges.description: Atomic charges by partitioning scheme (Bader, Mulliken, Löwdin, Hirshfeld).

magmoms_uB.description: Atomic magnetic moments after SCF (collinear or non-collinear projection).

results_singlepoint.description: Per D-23: single-point SCF result. Energy + optional forces/stress + optional ESA results.

forces_eV_per_A.description: Path to forces artefact (per-atom array stored separately to keep YAML readable).

import_source.description: Per D-25: provenance for docs imported from external archives (NOMAD, Materials Project, AFLOW).

preflight.description: Predictive pre-flight assessment produced by an external engine (e.g. Prodromos) BEFORE the expensive calculation is run. The post-hoc counterpart is the top-level `sanity` array; both use the gate-ID vocabulary in docs/gate-registry.md. Optional.

verdict.description: overall pre-flight verdict, e.g. GO / NO-GO / INVESTIGATE / REVIEW

gates.description: predictive gate evaluations; same id vocabulary as `sanity`

plan.description: recommended next step (route mode) and/or scored strategy tree (tree mode)

strategies.description: scored leaves (tree mode); each a candidate next workflow

proposed_workflow_ref.description: pointer to a draft tm-spec document for this strategy
